today.emptyBody: Choose your city to see today's prayer times. Everything stays on your phone — nothing is sent anywhere.

cityPicker.title: Choose your city
cityPicker.noMatch: No match — try the nearest big city.
cityPicker.hint: Type a city name, e.g. Houston.

quran.title: Quran
quran.devBadge: DEV translation (Pickthall, 1930) — final translation pending review

qibla.title: Qibla
qibla.chooseCityFirst: Choose your city to find the qibla direction.
qibla.magneticCaveat: Using magnetic north — your device could not provide true north
qibla.calibrate: Compass needs calibration — move your phone in a figure-8 motion
qibla.permissionNeeded: The compass needs location permission to work. Your location never leaves your phone.

more.title: Settings
more.hint: Prayer time settings. If you are not sure, the automatic options follow the most common conventions for your region.
more.notificationsHint: Get a reminder at each prayer time. Your phone's silent switch and Focus modes can mute these — that is an iPhone setting, not the app.
more.nightWarmDesc: Amber tones in the Quran reader, easier on the eyes before dawn
more.privacyNote: DeenDawn stores everything on your phone. No account, no ads, no tracking.
more.restartBody: Switching the app language needs a quick restart to change the layout direction.
more.fullAdhanHonesty: iPhones cannot play a full-length adhan from a notification. With "Full adhan", the reminder plays the short clip, and the full adhan plays when you open the app from it.

methods.Tehran: Institute of Geophysics, University of Tehran

notifications.suhoorBody: Fajr is coming soon — suhoor is ending.

calendar.title: Islamic calendar
calendar.disclaimer: Calculated (Umm al-Qura) — may differ from local moonsighting. You can adjust by ±1 day in Settings.

tasbih.title: Tasbih
tasbih.tapAnywhere: Tap anywhere in the circle to count
tasbih.tapArea: Counter at {{count}} of {{target}}. Tap to count.

zakat.title: Zakat calculator
zakat.pricesNote: Enter current prices yourself — the app never fetches prices online (privacy). Nisab uses {{gold}}g of gold or {{silver}}g of silver, whichever is lower in value.
zakat.belowNisab: Your zakatable wealth is below the nisab threshold — no zakat is due.
zakat.needPrices: Enter at least one metal price to work out the nisab threshold.
zakat.disclaimer: This is a calculation aid, not a religious ruling. Situations differ — please confirm with a knowledgeable scholar.

ask.title: Ask
ask.placeholder: Ask about a topic, word, or count…
ask.hint: Search-powered answers from the Quran text itself — counts, verses, and topics. Tap any reference to read it in context.
ask.countAnswer_one: {{count}} verse matches “{{term}}” in the bundled translation
ask.countAnswer_other: {{count}} verses match “{{term}}” in the bundled translation
ask.redirect: Questions about what is permissible deserve a qualified scholar, not an app — please ask one you trust. Verses related to your topic:
ask.empty: Nothing in the text matches that — try a different word.

library.title: Thinkers & books
library.noMatches: No matches in the bundled books.
library.reviewPending: Draft summaries — pending scholar review before public release.

about.title: About
about.privacyBody: DeenDawn keeps everything on your phone. No account, no ads, no analytics, no tracking. Your location is used only on this device for prayer times and the qibla, and is never transmitted. The only network use is streaming recitation audio you request.
about.devOnly: Development placeholder — final selection pending review
about.madeWith: Free forever. Built with care for the ummah.

onboarding.welcomeBody: Prayer times, the Quran, qibla, and more — free forever, no ads, no accounts. Everything stays on your phone.
onboarding.cityBody: Pick your city so prayer times are right. You can change it anytime in Settings.
onboarding.notifBody: Get a gentle reminder at each prayer time. Your iPhone will ask for permission — you can change your mind anytime.

audio.streamed: Streamed — nothing stored on your phone
audio.devBadge: DEV audio — placeholder tone, not recitation

tips.title: Support
tips.heading: Support DeenDawn
tips.body: DeenDawn is free forever — no ads, no accounts, no tracking. If it serves you well, an optional tip helps cover development and hosting.
tips.unavailable: Tips are not set up in this build yet. Nothing in the app depends on them — everything stays free.
tips.thanksBody: Your support keeps DeenDawn free for everyone. May it be a blessing for you.
tips.footnote: A tip is an optional purchase that supports app development. It is not a donation to any charitable cause.
